# VoWiFi implementation notice

The application-contained VoWiFi implementation in `Sources/EC25Toolbox/Features/VoWiFi`
was developed with reference to the protocol flow and public source code in:

- `boa-z/vowifi-go`: https://github.com/boa-z/vowifi-go
- License: GNU Affero General Public License version 3 (`AGPL-3.0`)

The complete AGPL-3.0 license text is already distributed in this repository at
`ThirdParty/lpac/LICENSES/AGPL-3.0-only.txt`.

Protocol behavior was additionally implemented against the relevant IETF and 3GPP
specifications. This notice does not change the licenses of separately identified
third-party components.
